title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on science, ethics and society.

questions.question: Do you think the pace of scientific and technological change is too fast for society to keep up with?
Are there areas where you think scientific research should be limited or banned for ethical reasons?

script.text: Some people argue that scientists have a responsibility not just to discover things, but also to consider the consequences of their discoveries for society. Do you agree?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
